category_sources: Official Guardsquare manual describes ProGuard as an open-sourced Java class file shrinker, optimizer, obfuscator, and preverifier.

display_name_sources: Official Guardsquare manual uses the ProGuard name.

docs_sources: Official Guardsquare ProGuard manual is the dedicated documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/Guardsquare/proguard, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
